response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:26: Identified as concert intro, no vocal music. 2. 02:27: Song performance starts, titled 'きゅるるん大作戦' on screen. 3. Identified performers as Hololive 3rd Generation. 4. Searched for lyrics, confirmed it is an original performance song. Transcription used for lyrics field.
response.global_summary: The video features a concert performance by Hololive 3rd generation VTubers (Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, and Houshou Marine) at their 'hololive 3rd generation live' concert. The song performed is 'きゅるるん大作戦' (Kyururun Daisakusen).

scenes.description: Crowd cheering, stage setup, and screen displaying 'hololive 3rd generation live' before the performance begins.
Hololive 3rd generation VTubers (Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, Houshou Marine) perform 'きゅるるん大作戦'. The stage features colorful lights and visuals, with lyrics displayed on the screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, Houshou Marine

[...] (Lyrics based on performance transcription)
